hero.headline:
40 Years Building Dream Outdoor
Living Spaces
hero.subheadline: From custom pools and spas to full landscape transformations, Teserra Outdoors has been the Coachella Valley and Orange County's most trusted outdoor builder since 1985. Let us turn your backyard into the resort you deserve.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Built From the Ground Up
services.subtitle: From pools and putting greens to outdoor kitchens and fire features, Teserra delivers every element of your dream backyard under one roof.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Residential and commercial pools designed and built with four decades of expertise. Every pool is tailored to your vision, property, and lifestyle.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Remodeling
cards.description: Complete renovation services from resurfacing and tile work to full redesigns. We modernize aging pools and transform them into stunning centerpieces.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Install
cards.description: Custom outdoor landscape planning and installation that transforms ordinary yards into beautiful, functional living environments you love.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Full outdoor kitchen design with built-in grills, countertops, cabinetry, and pergolas. Everything for alfresco dining and entertaining.

cards.title: Putting Greens & Turf
cards.description: Expert design and installation of golf putting greens and artificial turf. Our unique golfing industry expertise delivers greens that play true.

cards.title: Hardscape & Fire Features
cards.description: Premium patios, walkways, retaining walls, fire pits, and fireplaces using concrete, pavers, and natural stone. Craftsmanship that endures.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your outdoor living goals. We'll schedule a free on-site consultation to discuss design possibilities, timeline, and investment.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our licensed team handles everything — design, permitting, construction, and finishing. You stay informed at every stage with a dedicated project manager.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Oasis
steps.description: Your dream backyard is complete. From the first splash in your new pool to evening gatherings around the fire pit, it's time to live outdoors.

about.label: Why Clients Choose Teserra
about.headline: Four Decades of Building What Others Only Imagine
about.description: Since 1985, Teserra Outdoors has been the most respected name in pool construction and landscape design across the Coachella Valley and Orange County. We partner with homeowners, developers, builders, and contractors to deliver limitless possibilities for outdoor living — backed by Google Guaranteed status and California Contractor License #656128.

features.title: Licensed & Google Guaranteed
features.description: CA LIC #656128 and Google Guaranteed status mean you're working with a vetted, trusted, and insured professional.

features.title: Full-Service Outdoor Builder
features.description: Pools, landscapes, kitchens, hardscape, lighting, and turf — one team handles your entire project from concept to completion.

features.title: Putting Green Specialists
features.description: Our unique expertise in the golfing industry means we install putting greens that play true and last for years.

pricing.headline: Transparent Project Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom. We provide detailed proposals with clear scope, timeline, and investment — so you know exactly what you're getting.

guarantee.headline: Our "Craftsmanship" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every Teserra project is backed by our commitment to exceptional quality. If any aspect of our work doesn't meet the standards we promised, we'll make it right at no additional cost. After 40+ years, our reputation is built on standing behind every pool, every patio, and every project we deliver.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool project take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool builds take 8-16 weeks depending on scope and complexity. During your free consultation, we'll provide a detailed timeline for your specific project. We keep you informed at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you handle all permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes, Teserra manages everything — design, permitting, inspections, and construction. As a licensed California contractor (LIC #656128), we handle all municipal requirements so you don't have to.

faqs.question: Do you serve both Coachella Valley and Orange County?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have dedicated teams serving the entire Coachella Valley (La Quinta, Palm Springs, Palm Desert, and surrounding areas) as well as Orange County (Irvine, Newport Beach, Huntington Beach, and beyond).

faqs.question: Can you remodel my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Yes! Pool and spa remodeling is one of our specialties. From resurfacing and new tile to complete redesigns with added features like waterfalls or fire bowls, we can transform your existing pool into something extraordinary.

faqs.question: What makes Teserra different from other outdoor builders?
faqs.answer: 40+ years of experience, Google Guaranteed status, and true full-service capability set us apart. We handle everything from pools and landscapes to outdoor kitchens and putting greens — all under one roof with one accountable team.

testimonials.name: Tim H.
testimonials.text: Teserra was terrific to work with and built a beautiful pool and yard in what we felt was a timely manner. The whole experience exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Brian S. & Jane E.
testimonials.text: We are so thrilled with our Teserra pool. Adam was great to work with and Fernando was terrific. The project was on time and on budget and we have a beautiful pool.

testimonials.name: Barb R.
testimonials.text: Could not be more pleased! Everyone on the Teserra team — John, Brock, and Jessie — plus all the providers they chose were wonderful. Outstanding quality from start to finish.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a free design consultation. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed proposal — no pressure, no obligation.

footer.description: Builders of exceptional outdoor living. Serving the Coachella Valley & Orange County since 1985.
